sn27.9:1.2: “Monks, any desire-passion with regard to the earth property is a defilement of the mind.
sn27.9:1.3: Any desire-passion with regard to the liquid property…
sn27.9:1.7: the consciousness property is a defilement of the mind.
sn27.9:1.8: When, with regard to these six bases, the defilements of awareness are abandoned, then the mind is inclined to renunciation.
sn27.9:1.9: The mind fostered by renunciation feels malleable for the direct knowing of those qualities worth realizing.”
